coverage.contract: zig/src/main.zig --queue-sync-mode, zig/src/webgpu_ffi.zig QueueSyncMode
coverage.notes: per-command and deferred queue sync modes are available; trace-meta records queueSyncMode.

coverage.contract: zig/src/model.zig RenderDrawCommand first_vertex/first_instance
coverage.notes: command parser supports firstVertex/firstInstance aliases and native render lowering forwards offsets.

coverage.contract: RenderDrawCommand index_data/index_format/index_count/first_index/base_vertex + native DrawIndexed lowering
coverage.notes: draw_indexed consumes command-provided index data with explicit or inferred index format and dynamic index-buffer sizing.

coverage.contract: zig/src/wgpu_types.zig Procs + zig/src/wgpu_loader.zig loadProcs + zig/src/wgpu_render_commands.zig executeRenderDraw
coverage.notes: core render-pass APIs are first-class in the shared proc table: DeviceCreateRenderPipeline, CommandEncoderBeginRenderPass, RenderPassEncoder SetPipeline/SetVertexBuffer/SetIndexBuffer/SetBindGroup, Draw/DrawIndexed/(Indirect variants), End, and Release. render_draw fails fast as unsupported when required symbols are absent.

coverage.contract: zig/src/wgpu_render_api.zig + zig/src/wgpu_render_commands.zig render-pass state setup
coverage.notes: render_draw now applies bind-group (including dynamic offsets), viewport, scissor, blend-constant, stencil-reference, and pipeline bind-group-layout query in the native render path.

coverage.contract: RenderDrawCommand encode_mode + zig/src/wgpu_render_commands.zig encode branch
coverage.notes: render_draw supports explicit render-pass and render-bundle encoding modes with deterministic, contract-driven behavior.

coverage.contract: zig/src/wgpu_render_resources.zig + zig/src/wgpu_texture_procs.zig + zig/src/wgpu_render_assets.zig
coverage.notes: render_draw now uses a sampled texture + sampler bind-group contract; queueWriteTexture uploads deterministic texels; texture query/destroy lifecycle APIs are used by texture resource management and backend teardown.

coverage.contract: zig/src/wgpu_render_api.zig + zig/src/wgpu_render_commands.zig bundle encode/finish/execute
coverage.notes: native render lowering now creates render bundle encoders, encodes draw/direct+indirect variants, finishes bundles, and executes bundles through RenderPassEncoderExecuteBundles.

coverage.contract: zig/src/wgpu_surface_procs.zig + zig/src/webgpu_ffi.zig surface methods
coverage.notes: surface creation, capabilities, configure/get-current-texture/present/unconfigure/release wrappers are now implemented as explicit backend methods.

coverage.contract: zig/src/wgpu_async_procs.zig + zig/src/wgpu_render_commands.zig async pipeline path
coverage.notes: render pipeline creation now uses DeviceCreateRenderPipelineAsync with explicit wait, push/pop error scopes, and shader compilation-info retrieval before pipeline cache insert.

coverage.contract: render_draw pipelineMode/bindGroupMode + target format contract
coverage.notes: render_draw exposes explicit command-driven pass state (viewport/scissor/blend/stencil, dynamic bind-group offsets, encode mode, indexed/non-indexed variants, static/redundant bind modes) with deterministic validation and lowering.

coverage.contract: executionGpuTimestampTotalNs + executionGpuTimestampAttemptedCount + executionGpuTimestampValidCount trace-meta fields
coverage.notes: timestamp reliability is now explicit in execution artifacts via attempted/valid counters; readback path fails invalid timestamp ranges instead of silently normalizing.

coverage.contract: TextureQueryCommand expected_* fields + native texture query validation
coverage.notes: texture_query can now assert expected width/height/depth/format/dimension/view-dimension/sample-count/usage with fail-fast mismatch reporting.

coverage.contract: zig/src/wgpu_p1_capability_procs.zig + zig/src/wgpu_capability_runtime.zig + zig/src/webgpu_ffi.zig
coverage.notes: instance/adapter/device capability introspection APIs are dynamically loaded and exercised with explicit status checks, including feature/limits/info/proc-address paths and related free-members contracts.

coverage.contract: zig/src/wgpu_p1_resource_table_procs.zig + zig/src/wgpu_async_diagnostics_command.zig
coverage.notes: ResourceTable create/update/remove/destroy/release and pass/bundle/compute set-resource-table + set-immediates APIs are implemented behind explicit feature gating; unsupported adapters return deterministic unsupported status.

coverage.contract: zig/src/wgpu_p2_lifecycle_procs.zig + zig/src/wgpu_async_diagnostics_command.zig + zig/src/wgpu_capability_runtime.zig
coverage.notes: all requested AddRef entry points are loaded and wired; lifecycle diagnostics execute balanced addref/release touch paths for available object classes and skip unsupported object families deterministically.

coverage.contract: zig/src/wgpu_p0_procs.zig + zig/src/wgpu_resources.zig + zig/src/wgpu_commands.zig barrier lowering
coverage.notes: buffer replacement and teardown now call wgpuBufferDestroy before release; barrier commands lower through wgpuCommandEncoderClearBuffer with deterministic scratch-buffer sizing.

coverage.contract: zig/src/wgpu_p0_procs.zig + zig/src/wgpu_resources.zig + zig/src/wgpu_commands.zig
coverage.notes: compute pipelines use wgpuDeviceCreateComputePipelineAsync when available; dispatch path stages indirect args with wgpuCommandEncoderWriteBuffer, dispatches with wgpuComputePassEncoderDispatchWorkgroupsIndirect, and uses pass timestamps with wgpuComputePassEncoderWriteTimestamp when pass timestamps are available.

coverage.contract: zig/src/wgpu_p0_procs.zig querySetMatches + destroyQuerySet; compute/render query setup paths
coverage.notes: query sets now validate count/type via wgpuQuerySetGetCount/wgpuQuerySetGetType and call wgpuQuerySetDestroy before release in compute and render P0 helper paths.

coverage.contract: zig/src/wgpu_render_api.zig + zig/src/wgpu_render_p0.zig + zig/src/wgpu_render_commands.zig + zig/src/webgpu_ffi.zig feature-gating
coverage.notes: render pass now wires Begin/EndOcclusionQuery and WriteTimestamp query paths; multi-draw indirect APIs are used when WGPUFeatureName_MultiDrawIndirect is enabled and deterministically fall back to draw loops otherwise.

coverage.contract: zig/src/webgpu_ffi.zig deinit
coverage.notes: device teardown now explicitly calls wgpuDeviceDestroy before wgpuDeviceRelease.

coverage.contract: zig/src/wgpu_p0_procs.zig + zig/src/wgpu_render_api.zig + zig/src/wgpu_render_types.zig + zig/src/wgpu_resources.zig createPipelineLayoutWithPixelLocalStorage + zig/src/wgpu_async_pixel_local_storage.zig diagnostics mode
coverage.notes: Pixel-local-storage diagnostics now emit full pipeline-layout and render-pass descriptor chains (storage attachments + total size), feature-gate non-coherent mode explicitly, and execute wgpuRenderPassEncoderPixelLocalStorageBarrier inside recorded render passes.

coverage.contract: bench/vendor/dawn/src/dawn/dawn.json feature name enum + zig/src/wgpu_capability_runtime.zig adapter/device feature-list introspection (wgpuAdapterGetFeatures/wgpuDeviceGetFeatures) + bench/workloads.amd.vulkan.extended.json p1_capability_introspection_contract
coverage.notes: Inventory completion (2026-02-23): implemented via explicit Dawn feature-enum inventory contract, Zig capability introspection runtime path, and benchmark mapping contract.
